data [required]

object

The definition of PipelineData object.

attributes [required]

object

The definition of PipelineDataAttributes object.

config [required]

object

The definition of PipelineDataAttributesConfig object.

destinations [required]

[ <oneOf>]

The PipelineDataAttributesConfig destinations.

Option 1

object

The datadog_logs destination forwards logs to Datadog Logs.

id [required]

string

The DatadogLogsDestination id.

inputs [required]

[string]

The DatadogLogsDestination inputs.

type [required]

enum

The definition of DatadogLogsDestinationType object. Allowed enum values: datadog_logs

processors [required]

[ <oneOf>]

The PipelineDataAttributesConfig processors.

Option 1

object

The filter processor allows conditional processing of logs based on a Datadog search query. Logs that match the include query are passed through; others are discarded.

id [required]

string

The FilterProcessor id.

include [required]

string

The FilterProcessor include.

inputs [required]

[string]

The FilterProcessor inputs.

type [required]

enum

The FilterProcessor type. Allowed enum values: filter

Option 2

object

The parse_json processor extracts JSON from a specified field and flattens it into the event. This is useful when logs contain embedded JSON as a string.

field [required]

string

The ParseJSONProcessor field.

id [required]

string

The ParseJSONProcessor id.

include

string

The ParseJSONProcessor include.

inputs [required]

[string]

The ParseJSONProcessor inputs.

type [required]

enum

The ParseJSONProcessor type. Allowed enum values: parse_json

Option 3

object

The Quota Processor measures logging traffic for logs that match a specified filter. When the configured daily quota is met, the processor can drop or alert.

drop_events [required]

boolean

The QuotaProcessor drop_events.

id [required]

string

Unique identifier.

ignore_when_missing_partitions

boolean

The QuotaProcessor ignore_when_missing_partitions.

inputs [required]

[string]

The QuotaProcessor inputs.

limit [required]

object

Unified definition of QuotaLimit object.

enforce [required]

enum

The definition of QuotaLimitEnforceType object. Allowed enum values: bytes,events

limit [required]

int64

The limit for quota enforcement.

name [required]

string

The QuotaProcessor name.

overrides

[object]

The QuotaProcessor overrides.

fields [required]

[object]

The QuotaProcessorOverride fields.

name [required]

string

The field name.

value [required]

string

The field value.

limit [required]

object

Unified definition of QuotaLimit object.

enforce [required]

enum

The definition of QuotaLimitEnforceType object. Allowed enum values: bytes,events

limit [required]

int64

The limit for quota enforcement.

partition_fields

[string]

The QuotaProcessor partition_fields.

type [required]

enum

The definition of QuotaProcessorType object. Allowed enum values: quota

object

The field name.

string
